snapshot.title: Add/verify Vercel Analytics instrumentation across web app
snapshot.description: Ensure Vercel Analytics is correctly integrated in the web app, verify event coverage for key product mechanics/minigames, and document what is captured.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Vercel Analytics runtime is present and active in app layout
Key gameplay actions emit analytics events
Implementation notes include tracked events and where they fire

changes.newValue: Verified Vercel Analytics runtime in app layout via @vercel/analytics React component. Added explicit gameplay analytics event tracking utility and instrumented key actions: planet_transit_completed, planet_no_detection_confirmed, asteroid_mapping_completed, mars_classification_completed, narrative_flow_completed. Added event properties for score/date/hint usage/annotation count/classified count/storyline/chapter where applicable.
